name: sequoia-merchandising-cycle
description: Diagnose why growth stalled — scores a company website against the Sequoia Merchandising Cycle.
comment: The engine (src/engine, src/crawl) and tests run on Node 24's native TS type-stripping with ZERO dependencies — `npm test` and `npm run demo` work before `npm install`. The deps below are only for the Next.js web app. The engine calls the Anthropic + Firecrawl REST APIs via fetch, so no provider SDK is required.
